mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collection_folder (user_id, name, description, article_count, sort_order, default_folder, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{articleCount}, #{sortOrder}, #{defaultFolder}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, description, article_count, sort_order, default_folder, create_time, update_time FROM collection_folder WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY default_folder DESC, sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
